name: Strawberry Parfait Pie
recipeInstructions:
May fresh or frozen strawberries, or may substitute other fruit of choice such as blackberries, peaches, etc.
1. Heat one cup of water to boiling in a two-quart pan and remove from heat.
2. Add one package of lemon gelatin to the boiling water and stir until dissolved.
3. Stir in one pint of vanilla ice cream until melted.
4. Chill the mixture until it thickens for about 30 minutes.
5. Fold in sliced strawberries.
6. Turn the mixture into a cooled graham cracker pie shell.
7. The pie will be ready in half an hour and must be kept refrigerated.
